atStake: What's at stake if you stop
reversalLabel: How to reverse it, starting today

replacement.body: When the urge hits, do this instead.

cargo.title: Your cargo
cargo.body: If you slip, do this good deed right after.
cargo.verseTranslation: Indeed, good deeds erase bad deeds.
cargo.emptyTitle: Pair this with a good deed
cargo.emptyBody: Set a small good deed to do right after a slip. The Prophet ﷺ said: "Follow a bad deed with a good one and it will wipe it out."
cargo.editPlaceholder: Give two dollars in charity, pray two rak'ahs…

bracketing.title: Bracket the habit
bracketing.body: Same opening, same closing — every time. The repeated bookends train your brain to flip into this habit on cue and flip out cleanly when it's done.
bracketing.emptyBody: Pair a tiny opening and closing ritual with this habit. The same two-second moves before and after train the brain to flip into this habit on cue.
bracketing.startPlaceholder: Phone in another room, water on the desk…
bracketing.endPlaceholder: Close the laptop, jot one line about what you did…

stack.title: Stack onto a routine
stack.body: Atomic Habits' habit-stacking: anchor a new habit to a routine you already never miss. The existing routine becomes the cue.
stack.placeholder: After I pour my morning coffee, I will read one page.
stack.emptyBody: Write a single sentence: "After I [routine I already do], I will [this habit]." The routine becomes your reminder — no notification needed.

muted.activeReset: Consequence messaging is paused while you're in a dopamine reset.
muted.recentRelapse: Paused after a relapse — be gentle with yourself today.
muted.lowMood: Paused after a low check-in. Come back when you're steadier.

books.title: Your books
books.subtitle: Pages you log here count toward this habit's streak.
books.connectTitle: Connect this habit to your books
books.connectBody: Pages you log on any book will count toward this habit's daily total.
